text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's been in something of a slump
lately, so we've come to a shrine together to
make a prayer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I humbly implore that I be cleansed of any vices,
infelicities, and impurities.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting, Trainer. Let's return to the
academy.
choice_data_list: You know some difficult words, huh?
You know some difficult words, huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That was a prayer for purification. It's one my
grandparents recite on a daily basis at the shrine
in their home, so I've come to know it by heart.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thinking on it now, I feel that I've learned a lot
more than just martial arts from them.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, but would it be okay if I offered a
prayer for my grandparents as well?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll be right back.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting again. Shall we go?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh, please excuse me for just another moment.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! It seems my grandparents are mailing
me a package. They're sending my favorite
mixed-rice dish and a new martial arts uniform!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if they were somehow alerted to my
poor condition. I have to recover quickly to
minimize any concern.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As the saying goes, "Do all you can and leave the
rest to fate." Thus, I must start by doing all I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki regains her positive outlook, and
soon enough she's back to her usual self!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer. A moment ago, I prayed for the
strength to use my full capabilities in my races.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I sometimes think that if my opponents
haven't made a similar prayer, would that mean
only I receive the gods' favor?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wish to race on even standing with my peers.
Wouldn't it be unfair if my prayers gave me an
advantage over them?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki continues to overthink things and,
as a result, fails to climb out of her slump.
